tasks.label: CMake: Configure
tasks.detail: Re-run CMake configure (compiler, ROS2, Qt, flags from settings.json)

tasks.label: CMake: Build
tasks.detail: Incremental build via CMake Tools (build/)

tasks.label: CMake: Clean rebuild
tasks.detail: Clean then rebuild all targets

tasks.label: Build: make (configure + build)
tasks.detail: Canonical Makefile target (BUILD_ENVIRONMENT.md §2)

tasks.label: Build: fast (no reconfigure)
tasks.detail: Skip configure; use after editing .cpp/.hpp only

tasks.label: Build: canonical Release (Ninja, ROS2 off)
tasks.detail: CI/agent-style configure per BUILD_ENVIRONMENT.md (overwrites build/)

tasks.label: Build: clean rebuild (make)
tasks.detail: rm -rf build/ then configure + build

tasks.label: Build: Debug
tasks.detail: make build BUILD_TYPE=Debug

tasks.label: Build: ASAN (configure + build, build-asan/)
tasks.command: env -u CMAKE_ROOT cmake -B build-asan -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang-18 -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++-18 -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g" -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS="-fsanitize=address" -DCMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS="-fsanitize=address" -DSPECTRA_BUILD_TESTS=ON -DSPECTRA_BUILD_GOLDEN_TESTS=ON -DSPECTRA_BUILD_EXAMPLES=ON -DSPECTRA_USE_ROS2=ON -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON && cmake --build build-asan -j$(nproc)
tasks.detail: AddressSanitizer tree per BUILD_ENVIRONMENT.md §8 (separate from build/)

tasks.label: Build: ASAN fast (no reconfigure)
tasks.detail: Incremental ASan build; run configure task first if build-asan/ is missing

tasks.label: Build: Release (embed shared, build-release/)
tasks.command: env -u CMAKE_ROOT cmake -B build-release -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local -DSPECTRA_BUILD_EMBED_SHARED=ON && env -u CMAKE_ROOT cmake --build build-release -j$(nproc)
tasks.detail: Separate tree for install / libspectra_embed

tasks.label: Install: sudo (build-release/)
tasks.detail: Install to /usr/local after Build: Release (embed shared)

tasks.label: Test: ASAN unit (no GPU, parallel)
tasks.detail: Non-GPU tests under AddressSanitizer; requires Build: ASAN

tasks.label: Test: unit (no GPU, parallel)
tasks.detail: Default CI-style suite; excludes gpu label

tasks.label: Test: GPU
tasks.detail: Requires Vulkan device or lavapipe; serial (-j1) — parallel VkInstance crashes NVIDIA driver

tasks.label: Test: golden (xvfb + lavapipe)
tasks.command: export VK_ICD_FILENAMES=$(find /usr/share/vulkan/icd.d -name '*lvp*' 2>/dev/null | head -1) LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 && xvfb-run -a ctest --test-dir build -L golden -j1 --output-on-failure
tasks.detail: Pixel baselines; single-threaded (BUILD_ENVIRONMENT.md §3)

tasks.label: Test: single unit binary
tasks.detail: Run one Google Test executable directly

tasks.label: Test: make (all ctest)
tasks.detail: Build if needed, then full ctest (includes GPU if built)

tasks.label: Test: golden — update baselines
tasks.command: cmake --build build -j$(nproc) && SPECTRA_UPDATE_BASELINES=1 ctest --test-dir build -L golden --output-on-failure -j1
tasks.detail: Regenerate tests/golden/baseline/ after intentional visual changes

tasks.label: Verify: build + unit tests
tasks.detail: Quick pre-commit check after small edits

tasks.label: Verify: ASAN build + unit tests
tasks.detail: Full ASan configure, build, and non-GPU ctest (BUILD_ENVIRONMENT.md §8)

tasks.label: Format: clang-format (all)
tasks.detail: ./format_project.sh — writes changes

tasks.label: Format: check (no writes)
tasks.detail: Fail if formatting drift; CI-style

tasks.label: Lint: clang-tidy (all src/)
tasks.detail: Requires compile_commands.json in build/

tasks.label: Run: spectra (inproc)
tasks.detail: Single-process app; MCP on http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp when enabled

tasks.label: Run: spectra (multiproc default)
tasks.detail: Default runtime; backend + window agents

tasks.label: Run: example
tasks.detail: Run a built example binary by name

tasks.label: Kill: spectra processes
tasks.detail: Stop stale daemons before MCP/visual QA

tasks.label: Python: pip install (editable)
tasks.detail: pip install -e ".[dev]" in python/

tasks.label: Python: pytest
tasks.detail: python/spectra IPC and API tests
